title: CSIO Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 06 Project Associate I, II, Senior Project Associate Posts
description: The Central Scientific Instruments Organisation (CSIO) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 06 Project Associate I, II, Senior Project Associate Jobs. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech in Electrical, Electronics, Computer Science, and Mechanical Engineering can apply for the CSIO Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can...
